ogTitle: Alexandra vs Alexandra Hills: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Alexandra and Alexandra Hills.
heading: Alexandra vs Alexandra Hills — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Alexandra, Queensland and Alexandra Hills, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Alexandra has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Alexandra Hills (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Alexandra or Alexandra Hills safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Alexandra has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Alexandra Hills scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Alexandra scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Alexandra Hills scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Alexandra or Alexandra Hills?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Alexandra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
